prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your military veteran transition forward
items: Complete your DD-214 verification and request official copies from the National Personnel Records Center
Create an account on eBenefits and VA.gov to establish your digital veteran profile and benefit access
Schedule a mandatory separation physical and mental health screening at your base medical facility
Research and identify 5-7 civilian careers that match your military occupational specialty (MOS) and skills
Attend a comprehensive transition assistance program (TAP) workshop and complete all required modules
Inventory and document all your military training certificates, security clearances, and specialized qualifications
